emails.subject: Computer problems
emails.body: Computer problems I keep getting "insufficient memory" messages on my computer. And that's without running Dynegy Direct. The IT guy said I need one of the following 1. New super duper computer 2. More memory, my computer has 128meg of ram 3. Run my applications on 2 cmputers like mine instead of one.
